__package__.yml.rawContents:
service:
  auth: false
  base-path: ''
  endpoints:
    createAUser:
      path: /users
      method: POST
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      display-name: Create a user
      request:
        body: User
        content-type: application/json
      response:
        docs: User created successfully
        type: User
        status-code: 201
      examples:
        - request:
            name: name
            email: email
          response:
            body:
              id: id
              name: name
              email: email
              password: password
              createdAt: '2024-01-15T09:30:00Z'
              isActive: true
  source:
    openapi: ../openapi.yml
types:
  User:
    properties:
      id:
        type: optional<string>
        access: read-only
      name: string
      email:
        type: string
        validation:
          format: email
      password:
        type: optional<string>
        access: write-only
      createdAt:
        type: optional<datetime>
        access: read-only
      isActive:
        type: optional<boolean>
        default: true
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
display-name: Respect Access Modifiers API
